title: stapfochloa ciliata
intro: Stapfochloa ciliata is a species of grass within the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass found in certain regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stapfochloa ciliata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering its leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
